name: or-copilot
description: AI Operations Research Modeling Assistant — automatic optimization model formulation, code generation, and solving from natural language descriptions. Synthesizes best practices from 11 academic papers (OptiMUS, Chain-of-Experts, NL2OR, AutoFormulator, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent, OR-R1, OptLLM, MA-GTS, MURKA, AutoMILP).
author: OR-Copilot Contributors

commands.name: /orpilot:solve
commands.description: Solve an optimization problem from natural language description — runs the full pipeline: interview → classify → solver-fit → extract → formulate → code → verify → solve → report

commands.name: /orpilot:interview
commands.description: Interactive interview session to clarify and structure an operations research problem — saves session.json for resumption

commands.name: /orpilot:compile-ir
commands.description: Compile an IR JSON file to executable solver code (Gurobi/CPLEX/PuLP/Pyomo/OR-Tools) — fully deterministic, zero LLM cost

commands.name: /orpilot:benchmark
commands.description: Run benchmarks on IndustryOR, G-REAL, BWOR, NL4OPT, or MAMO datasets to evaluate modeling accuracy

commands.name: /orpilot:configure
commands.description: Configure solver backend, LLM architecture tier (A/B/C), model selection, and knowledge base settings

agents.name: or-interviewer
agents.description: Conducts structured interviews to clarify ambiguous OR problem descriptions through targeted questioning — synthesizes ORPilot interview agent + Chain-of-Experts Terminology Interpreter

agents.name: or-classifier
agents.description: Defines and classifies the business problem into OR problem types (TSP / Scheduling / Assignment / Network Flow / Production Planning / ...) — inspired by Chain-of-Experts and OR-LLM-Agent capability classification

agents.name: or-solver-fit
agents.description: Analyzes which problem components are solver-suitable vs. better handled by heuristics/rules/human judgment; recommends the technical framework and solving route — inspired by NL2OR solver triage patterns and AutoMILP domain analysis

agents.name: or-extractor
agents.description: Extracts the structured 5-tuple {Sets, Parameters, Decision Variables, Constraints, Objective} from the confirmed problem definition — synthesizes MURKA's extraction approach and MA-GTS's multi-agent information extraction

agents.name: or-formulator
agents.description: Builds the universal IR v2 from structured elements, constructing mathematical formulations with connection graph tracking — synthesizes OptiMUS Formulator, AutoFormulator MCTS, and CoE Modeling Expert

agents.name: or-coder
agents.description: Generates solver-specific executable code (Gurobi/CPLEX/PuLP/Pyomo/OR-Tools) from the universal IR — supports both LLM-based code generation and deterministic IR compilation

agents.name: or-verifier
agents.description: Performs 4-layer verification (structural → execution → correctness → equivalence) with OR-LLM-Agent escalation protocol — synthesizes MURKA 4D reward, AutoFormulator SMT equivalence, and CoE Backward Reflection

agents.name: or-reporter
agents.description: Generates human-readable solution reports with decision summaries, variable tables, constraint satisfaction analysis, and visualization suggestions — inspired by NL2OR Report Generator

PostToolUse.name: post_extraction_verify
PostToolUse.description: Automatically validates structured extraction output (5-tuple completeness, variable consistency, constraint referencing) after the or-extractor agent completes

PostToolUse.name: post_code_gen_check
PostToolUse.description: Automatically performs syntax checking and sandbox execution of generated solver code after the or-coder agent completes

UserPromptSubmit.name: user_confirm_intercept
UserPromptSubmit.description: Intercepts user input during the problem definition / classification / solver-fit confirmation phase to ensure explicit user approval before proceeding to structured extraction
